zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Cathcart於1576年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡爾頓時，她的父親John Cathcart of Carleton36歲，母親Helen or Helein possibly Margaret Lady Carletoun Wallace38歲。她於1597年與John Eccles在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1635年在蘇格蘭享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cathcart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Cathcart was born in 1576, in Carleton, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Cathcart of Carleton, was 36 and her mother, Helen or Helein possibly Margaret Lady Carletoun Wallace, was 38. She married John Eccles in 1597, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1635, in Scotland, at the age of 59.

Elle a épousé John Eccles en 1597, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1635, à Écosse, à l’âge de 59 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Cathcart(이)가 1576년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 칼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cathcart of Carleton(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helen or Helein possibly Margaret Lady Carletoun Wallace(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1597년 스컷랜드에서 John Eccles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1635년 스컷랜드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Cathcart родилась в 1576 г. в местности карлетон, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Cathcart of Carleton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen or Helein possibly Margaret Lady Carletoun Wallace, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Eccles в 1597 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1635 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 59 лет.
